title: BRS Dry Bulk Weekly Newsletter
summary:
Main
The world has moved on from the coronavirus pandemic - except for China. As President Xi embarks on his third term, he stays resolute to the ‘Zero-Covid' policy. Some of the country's largest cities like Guangzhou are placed under restrictions, and millions are spent on swabbing tests and resources utilized to trace individual cases one after another.
